title: Solara Dimension
description: Huge dimension like the overworld. No mobs spawn, Real sky color, and much more!
body:
Long Description: 
 
Step into the Solara Dimension, a vast and vibrant world where nature reigns supreme and everything is larger than life. In this peaceful dimension, towering creatures roam the landscape, offering a friendly and awe-inspiring presence as you explore the expansive terrain. 
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![solara](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97edc607af35baec1a43d3c849f9355da3f5da67.png)
**''Almost''**

 
Do you also dream of living in a world without having to fight zombies. skeletons, creepers, ets every night? then this dimension is definitely for you! 
The only enemy you have is if you encounter a pillager tower / woodland mansion / monsteroom and in the caves!
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![get started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ce74cb6b79020e04f3b364da044a7ae7c5f556.png)
Craft the Solara Dimension Portal Igniter Stick ( See photo )
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b91a94838a6e6d1f1e8119e2a5b98a47a5fac93e.png)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f0a083593f76cc6c4ff39f6570a57d7bdd02165.png)

Right-click on the Solara Dimension Portal with the Solara Dimension Portal Igniter Stick.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
About the Dimension:

The dimension is based on the normal overworld of Minecraft. (only a bit better in terms of nature & safety)

About Nature:
Our dimension is rich in color from nature! (See photo)
![naure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eccd02290f907fb5e622d458ce57e6b62089d387.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
